chart_title: Synthetic #8 — percent x ticks + sci-notation y ticks

x_axis.title: Saturation fraction
x_axis.value_storage_convention: Data values stored as fractions in [0,1] (tick_value / 100). x_axis_unit recorded as '%' to reflect the printed labels; consumers must apply *100 for percent display.
x_axis.notes: Axis title has no parenthesized unit; the '%' qualifier lives in the tick labels themselves.

y_axis.title: Photon yield
y_axis.value_storage_convention: Data values stored in real cps (label_value * 1e7). The small '1e7' label above the y-axis is the matplotlib scientific-notation offset and must be applied before fitting the calibration.

notes: Synthetic stressor chart for the tick-parser: percent-suffix x ticks plus scientific-notation y-axis offset. Single line series 'Throughput' rendered with filled circle markers (matplotlib default blue). Legend at top-left inside plot area. Resolution 750x450.
